form.formComment: Racing second-up today. Fresh up after three months finished fifth of 19 runners at Cork on April 5 over 3822m, 9 len behind Sainte Lucie carrying 63.5kg at $13. Previously second-up finished second of 8 starters at Limerick on December 29 over 3822m, 0.5 len behind Holy See with 70kg at $6. Key runner who is expected to feature.

form.formComment: Racing well. Resumes off a 50 day letup. Last run finished third of 9 runners at Thurles on February 19 over 4626m, 13 len behind Barnahash Mason with 71.5kg at $8.50.
